creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Andrew from comment #1)

From <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/xsane/#description>: 

> It works either standalone or as a GIMP plugin.

Re: <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/xsane/#config> what's built by the cluster does include GIMP plugin support. 

You can, if you wish, build for yourself with: 

GIMP=off
